analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,700 as of Apr 25 00:22 UTC. Up ~13% in April, on track for best month in ~1 year. Key resistance: $79,000. Strategy bought 34,164 BTC ($2.54B) — largest since 2024.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 46 (Fear zone) — cautious but not extreme
Long/short ratio: 50.68% — near-even split, undecided market
BTC dominance: 58.1% (rising) — capital rotating to safety
Spot ETF: 5 consecutive days positive inflows, $238M on Apr 21
USDT supply ~$150B (near ATH) — ample liquidity, structurally bullish
KelpDAO $292M exploit: DeFi TVL -$14B, altcoins fragile, BTC unaffected
CPI Mar 2026: 3.3% YoY (high) — no rate cuts expected near-term
FOMC Apr 28-29: 99.5% probability hold; risk = hawkish tone
analysis.macro_backdrop: Fed funds on hold. FOMC Apr 28-29 — 99.5% hold priced in but hawkish surprise possible. CPI 3.3% limits dovish pivot. GDP Q1 advance + PCE due Apr 30 — major risk events beyond 24h. Geopolitical: Iran/Hormuz tensions persist, oil elevated. Big Tech earnings (MSFT/Apple) Apr 29-30.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral: Strong monthly momentum (+13%) and institutional demand (ETF inflows, Strategy $2.54B buy, USDT ATH liquidity) are bullish, but Fear & Greed at 46 (fear), near-even long/short ratio, $79K resistance, FOMC uncertainty Apr 28-29, and high CPI prevent a bullish call. Confidence 0.40 — below bot threshold (0.50) — macro filter INACTIVE this cycle.
